team.date_founded: Founded on the protoplanet Vesta, where the punishing low gravity shaped a unique long-ball game.
team.number_of_fans: Around 16 million, devoted to their gravity-defying side.
team.badge: A ball arcing high over a cratered protoplanet horizon.
team.home_kit: Pale silver and sky-blue with a high-arc trajectory motif.
team.away_kit: White with blue trim and a faint crater pattern.
team.third_kit: Deep space-blue with a luminous arc.
team.history: Vesta are masters of low-gravity football — a direct side that launches long, floating balls into the great open spaces the weak gravity creates. It looks strange to outsiders and works beautifully for the Floaters.
team.club_culture: Inventive, proud, and at home in the low gravity. The Floaters embrace what makes their world different.
team.political_leaning: Belt frontier-pragmatist — practical, independent, and quietly inventive.
trophy_cabinet: A reputation for a style no one else can replicate
legends: Arc Velmore — the target striker who turned the high ball into an art
achievements: Most goals from direct, long-ball play in the belt

stadium.date_built: Built in a great crater on the Vestan surface.
stadium.sponsors: Backed by the protoplanet's survey and mining guilds.
stadium.pitch_size: Large and open, to exploit the floating long ball.
stadium.pitch_type: Hardy synthetic turf rated for the extreme low gravity.
stadium.bio: The Crater is a wide, open bowl where the ball seems to hang in the thin gravity. Visiting sides struggle to judge the floating long balls the Floaters thrive on.

training_facility.date_built: A standard complex on the crater rim.
training_facility.sponsors: Funded by the Vestan survey guilds.
training_facility.bio: The Vesta Athletic Centre drills the timing and aerial judgement that low-gravity, direct football demands — a craft unique to the protoplanet.

manager.appearance: Tall and angular, watches the high balls arc with a craftsman's eye.
manager.bio: Float Inoue is the apostle of low-gravity direct football, building Vesta sides that launch floating long balls into space no other team knows how to defend. Strange, effective, and proudly Vestan.
manager.playing_history: A target striker who mastered the Vestan high ball.
manager.playing_philosophy: Use the gravity. Go direct, go long, and attack the space the low gravity gives you.
manager.culture: An inventor who turned his world's quirk into a weapon.
achievements: Built the belt's unique low-gravity game

managing_staff.appearance: Lean and precise, drills aerial timing in the thin gravity.
managing_staff.bio: Crust Eriksson conditions players for the vacuum-thin, low-gravity Vestan game, the specialist behind the Floaters' aerial mastery.
managing_staff.playing_philosophy: Train for the gravity you have. Master the arc and you master the match.

players.appearance: Calm and commanding, judges the high balls.
players.bio: Lava Reyes is the balanced keeper who reads the floating long balls better than any visiting forward.
achievements: Most high claims in the side

players.appearance: Tireless and rugged, grafts the flank.
players.bio: Igneous Cruz is the workhorse full-back who works the channel and launches the long diagonal.
achievements: Most long passes by a defender

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the aerial anchor.
players.bio: Magma Okafor is the team-first defender who wins the aerial duels the low-gravity game produces.

players.appearance: Combative and firm, the bite at the back.
players.bio: Basalt Sato is the aggressive defender who dominates the physical, floating battles.
achievements: Most duels won in the side

players.bio: Crater Lee is the composed defender who keeps Vesta solid against the rare quick side.

players.appearance: Inventive and precise, the long-ball architect.
players.bio: Pyro Kim is the creative midfielder who pings the floating diagonals the Floaters live on.
Ember Mori is the team-first midfielder who chases down the second balls the long game creates.

players.appearance: Balanced and tidy, the steady pivot.
players.bio: Flare Nakamura is the composed midfielder who keeps the direct game from becoming aimless.
achievements: Highest pass completion in the side

players.appearance: Tall and predatory, the target man.
players.bio: Eruption Rivera is the selfish target striker who attacks the floating long balls with deadly timing.

players.appearance: Direct and willing, the second striker.
players.bio: Scorch Patel is the aggressive forward who feeds off the flick-ons in the low gravity.

players.appearance: Self-assured and sharp, the wide finisher.
players.bio: Cinder Novak is the selfish wide forward who attacks the space the long ball opens.

players.appearance: Older and careful, the calm deputy keeper.
players.bio: Ash Torres is the cautious veteran second keeper, dependable when called.

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the dependable squad defender.
players.bio: Slag Anderson is the team-first deputy who keeps the aerial block intact in rotation.

players.appearance: Young and balanced, an academy defender on the rise.
players.bio: Coke Martinez is the promising young defender learning the Floaters' aerial craft.

players.appearance: Inventive and raw, an academy playmaker in waiting.
players.bio: Char Chandra is the creative deputy who can ping the long diagonals from the bench.

players.appearance: Lean and hungry, an academy striker with a selfish edge.
players.bio: Blaze Ito is the eager young target man pushing for a place among the Floaters.
